items.summary: Save the newly uploaded gaming artwork image (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-4.jpg — a masked figure in a white turtleneck with a Gucci cap, neon red halo, red diamond YouTube play button, and dark esports background) as the new profile avatar static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png, replacing the existing file.

Generate a 192×192 px variant of the newly uploaded image (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-4.jpg) and save it as frontend/public/assets/generated/pwa-icon.dim_192x192.png, replacing the existing PWA icon at that size.

Generate a 512×512 px variant of the newly uploaded image (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-4.jpg) and save it as frontend/public/assets/generated/pwa-icon.dim_512x512.png, replacing the existing PWA icon at that size.

Audit all frontend components (Navbar, AboutSection, RosterSection, PlayerCard, Footer, NewsSection, AnnouncementCard, PWAInstallBanner, LandingPage) and ensure every location that displays a profile image, player avatar, or logo uses /assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png. The hero background image (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png) must NOT be changed.
